rules.h1: text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight text-slate-900 (or white on dark hero)

components.button_primary: bg-teal-600 text-white hover:bg-teal-700 px-6 py-3 rounded-lg font-semibold transition-colors shadow-sm
components.button_secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 hover:border-slate-300 px-6 py-3 rounded-lg font-semibold transition-colors
components.card_base: bg-white rounded-2xl p-8 border border-slate-100 shadow-sm
components.trust_badge: inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-teal-50 text-teal-700 text-sm font-medium

sections.name: utility_bar
sections.description: Thin strip at the top. Background: slate-900. Text: white/slate-300.
sections.layout: flex justify-between items-center py-2 px-6 text-sm

sections.name: header
sections.description: Sticky header with nav. Background: white/90 backdrop-blur-md. Border-bottom.
sections.layout: flex justify-between items-center py-4 px-6 sticky top-0 z-50

sections.name: hero
sections.description: Dark hero section. Background: slate-900 with subtle background image overlay (opacity-20).
sections.layout: py-24 lg:py-32 grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-12 items-center
sections.visuals: Dark navy background, large white typography, teal accents for buttons/badges.

sections.name: trust_metrics
sections.description: Stats strip immediately below hero or overlapping hero bottom.
sections.layout: grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 p-8 bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-lg -mt-12 relative z-10 border border-slate-100

sections.name: who_we_serve
sections.layout: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-5 gap-6 mt-24

sections.name: product_divisions
sections.description: 10 divisions with subtle pastel card backgrounds.
sections.visuals: Cards use very light tints (e.g., slate-50, teal-50, blue-50) for background, no heavy borders.

sections.name: compliance_band
sections.description: Trust band for certifications and compliance.

sections.name: final_cta
sections.layout: py-24 bg-slate-900 text-white rounded-3xl my-24 text-center mx-6

hero_background.description: Modern clean hospital interior to be used as dark overlaid background.

who_we_serve_team.description: Diverse team of doctors and nurses.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark navy (#0F172A) and teal (#0D9488) palette. The hero MUST be dark.
Use Phosphor icons (via @phosphor-icons/react or lucide-react) for medical specialties (Bone, Heart, Lungs, etc).
Divisions should have subtle pastel backgrounds (e.g. bg-slate-50, bg-teal-50/50, bg-blue-50/50).
Make sure all components use generous padding (e.g., p-8 or p-12) as per the spacing system.
The Hero background image MUST have a heavy dark overlay (e.g. bg-slate-900/80 or bg-slate-900/90) so it looks like a subtle texture, not a distracting bright image.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
